summary: None of the listed cell types—chief, goblet, paneth, or parietal—are involved in directed proliferation from top to bottom of intestinal villi. True cellular proliferation originates from stem cells at the crypt base, generating differentiating cells that migrate upwards into the villus tips, with goblet cells being derived but not actively proliferating vertically.

Answer choice: C
